The Cost of Invention

story_concept:
The Cost of Invention
Every blueprint he touches reveals not just the design but the inevitable doom it will bring, forcing him to navigate a medieval kingdom where progress is a double-edged sword that could resurrect the very machines that destroyed his future world.
